# Vendored Enchanted Source

- Upstream: https://github.com/gluonfield/enchanted.git
- Commit: 84d0e26df7b2add017bedb8ca1f60d824ed337a6
- Tag: v1.8.2
- License: See LICENSE in this directory.

QuillUI vendors this small upstream app source tree so Linux compatibility,
packaging, and visual-parity checks can run without cloning the app on every CI
job. Keep the app source pristine; compatibility changes belong in QuillUI
libraries, lowering scripts, or generated package tooling.
